title: Washington-Jefferson Era Foreign Policy
public_claim: Washington-Jefferson Era Foreign Policy is presented as a historical or operational case-study room.
distinctive_mechanism: The working mechanism is to move from case definition to actors, constraints, causal mechanism, analogy limits, operational decision point, and limited lesson. The reader should be able to ask what enters the room, what transformation occurs, what judgment or work product leaves, and which gate prevents overclaiming.
